_note: Hand-maintained fallback (no Python interpreter available in this environment — scripts/lessons.py could not run). Bookkeeping is best-effort per references/lessons.md's no-script fallback path.

lessons.source: spec.md SCAF-02 (P1 AC2) / validation.md AC table
lessons.text: When a spec designates a manual/external verification method (DevTools inspection, CI dashboard observation) for an acceptance criterion, flag it as a spec-precision gap rather than silently passing it from static file evidence alone.

lessons.source: spec.md SCAF-08 (P2 AC2) / validation.md AC table
lessons.text: When a spec designates a manual/external verification method (DevTools inspection, CI dashboard observation) for an acceptance criterion, flag it as a spec-precision gap rather than silently passing it from static file evidence alone.

lessons.source: apps/frontend/package.json:10, apps/backend/package.json:10 (typecheck script uses tsc -b, design.md specifies tsc --noEmit)
lessons.text: When a per-package script deviates from the design doc's literal command even for a technically sound reason, mark the deviation with an inline comment or equivalent doc note so it is not silently undocumented.

lessons.source: spec.md P1 AC5 / validation.md Spec-Anchored Acceptance Criteria table
lessons.text: When a spec's acceptance criterion asserts that changing a shared config/token value propagates to consumers without code changes, write a test that actually mutates the value at runtime and re-asserts a consumer's resolved output, not just a test of the consumer's current fixed values.

lessons.source: spec.md P2 AC2 (Button hover) / AC3 (Input focused) / validation.md Spec-Anchored Acceptance Criteria table
lessons.text: When a spec's variant/state matrix names a pseudo-class-driven state (hover, focus), add a test that fires the corresponding event and asserts a distinct computed style, not just that the CSS rule exists in the stylesheet.

lessons.source: apps/frontend/src/design-system/components/MoodPicker/MoodPicker.tsx:3-5 (SPEC_DEVIATION comment: Mood type is a placeholder, no MoodEntry domain code exists yet)
lessons.text: When a component's prop type stands in for a not-yet-defined domain model, mark it with an inline SPEC_DEVIATION comment naming the missing domain source and the condition under which it must be revisited.
